text.title: EU Sovereign LLM Deployment Bundle Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for eu-sovereign-llm-deployment-bundle showing inputs, rule application, and final artefact.

example.title: EU bank deploying a high-risk credit-scoring assistant

good.description: Mistral EU-region inference + Qdrant EU-region store + Grafana Cloud EU + audit log to EU S3. Deny-by-default egress. Risk class high-risk re-evaluated semi-annually. EBA + DPA notified at launch.

bad.description: OpenAI default endpoint + Pinecone US + Datadog US. EU customer data flows everywhere. Schrems II exposure on day one.
